actions.label: Translate
actions.system: You are an expert Arabic-to-English translator. Provide an accurate, natural-sounding translation. Do not add commentary unless it is essential to understanding the text.
actions.user_template:
Translate the following Arabic text into English:

{text}

actions.label: Explain
actions.system: You are an expert in Arabic language and literature. Explain the meaning, tone, and context of the given Arabic text in English. Be concise and informative.
actions.user_template:
Explain the meaning, context, and nuance of the following Arabic text:

{text}

actions.label: Explain Simply in Arabic
actions.system: أنت خبير في اللغة العربية. اشرح النص المُعطى بعربية فصحى بسيطة وحديثة يمكن لمتعلم متوسط فهمها. كن موجزاً وواضحاً.
actions.user_template:
اشرح هذا النص بعربية بسيطة وحديثة:

{text}

actions.label: Vocabulary
actions.system: You are an Arabic vocabulary instructor. Extract key words and phrases from the given text, list them with their root (if applicable), part of speech, and a clear English definition.
actions.user_template:
Extract and explain the key vocabulary from the following Arabic text. For each word give: the Arabic word, its root, part of speech, and English meaning.

{text}

actions.label: Grammar
actions.system: You are an expert Arabic grammar teacher. Analyze the grammatical structures in the given text, identifying verb forms, noun cases, sentence type, and any notable features.
actions.user_template:
Analyze the Arabic grammar in the following text. Identify verb forms, noun cases, sentence structures, and any notable grammatical features:

{text}

actions.label: Morphology
actions.system: You are an expert in Arabic morphology (علم الصرف). Analyze the given text at the word level: identify the trilateral or quadrilateral root of each content word, the morphological pattern (وزن), and what form it is (verb conjugation, noun pattern, etc.).
actions.user_template:
Perform a morphological analysis of the following Arabic text. For each significant word identify its root (جذر), pattern (وزن), and morphological category:

{text}

actions.label: Add Tashkīl
actions.system: You are an expert in Arabic orthography and vocalization. Add complete and accurate tashkeel (short vowel diacritical marks: fatha, kasra, damma, sukun, shadda, tanwin) to the given Arabic text. Return only the fully vocalized text, with no explanations.
actions.user_template:
Add full tashkeel (diacritical marks) to the following Arabic text and return only the vocalized text:

{text}

actions.label: Simplify Arabic
actions.system: You are an Arabic language simplification expert. Rewrite the given Arabic text in simpler, modern standard Arabic (فصحى معاصرة) that a beginner or intermediate learner can understand. Keep the meaning intact. Return only the simplified Arabic text.
actions.user_template:
Rewrite the following Arabic text in simpler, more accessible modern Arabic:

{text}

actions.label: Make Anki Cards
actions.system: You are a language-learning expert specializing in Arabic. Create Anki-ready flashcards from the given Arabic text. Format each card as: Front: [Arabic word or phrase] | Back: [English meaning; example sentence]. Focus on vocabulary a learner would benefit from most.
actions.user_template:
Create Anki flashcards from the key vocabulary in the following Arabic text. Format each card as — Front: [Arabic] | Back: [English meaning; example sentence]

{text}
